channel.title: NACL Charlton, JN Kanji, K Johal, A Bailey, SS Plitt, C MacDonald, A Kunst, E Buss, LE Burnes, K Fonseca, BM Berenger, K Schnabl, J Hu, W Stokes, N Zelyas, G Tipples | PlatCOVID
channel.description: NACL Charlton, JN Kanji, K Johal, A Bailey, SS Plitt, C MacDonald, A Kunst, E Buss, LE Burnes, K Fonseca, BM Berenger, K Schnabl, J Hu, W Stokes, N Zelyas, G Tipples

item.title: Evaluation of Six Commercial Mid- to High-Volume Antibody and Six Point-of-Care Lateral Flow Assays for Detection of SARS-CoV-2 Antibodies.
